backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (Note, Song, SoundPreset, OcarinaLayout, etc.) and in-memory maps for fingering patterns, songs, and sound presets, including several hardcoded preset songs across folk and other genres. Includes blob storage mixin.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report listing three implemented features: ocarina audio synthesis for preset song playback, a Sound Presets UI panel, and consistent 4-hole 2×2 ocarina visuals throughout the app, each with associated files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON map of frontend source file paths to short summaries describing each component's purpose, props, and key behaviors for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom property design tokens for light and dark themes including colors, radius, sidebar, and chart variables.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA titled 'Ocarina Tablature Composer' that mounts the app at the root div and loads the main TSX entry point.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app with TanStack Router, QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and sidebar navigation; defines page components (Settings, Library, DesignEditor) and an AuthGate handling Internet Identity login and user registration.
React component for configuring per-note fingering patterns on a 4-hole ocarina; loads patterns from the backend, allows toggling holes via OcarinaVisual, and saves all patterns plus the selected octave to the backend.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaDesignEdi: A canvas-based editor component that allows users to drag and resize 4 finger holes on an ocarina body image, with support for loading/saving layouts and preset background images.
frontend/src/components/OcarinaVisual.ts: An SVG component that renders a stylized ocarina with a 2x2 grid of 4 holes, visually indicating which holes are covered or open based on a fingering pattern prop.
frontend/src/components/OctaveSelector.t: A dropdown selector component for choosing an octave range, which updates both local state via a callback and the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/PianoKeyboard.ts: An interactive piano keyboard component supporting mouse and keyboard input for C5–C6, playing synthesized notes with optional pitch offset and recording callback.
frontend/src/components/SheetMusicUpload: A file upload component that accepts sheet music images, runs them through an analyzer utility to detect notes, shows progress and warnings, and passes detected notes to a parent callback.
frontend/src/components/SongEditor.tsx: A full song editor component with ocarina audio synthesis, fingering pattern management, note sequencing, playback, and save functionality using a 4-hole 2x2 layout.
frontend/src/components/SoundSettingsPan: A React panel component for adjusting ocarina sound settings (tone, reverb, pitch) via sliders, and for saving/loading named sound presets. It uses React Query mutations to persist changes and displays existing presets as loadable cards.
frontend/src/components/StaffNotation.ts: Renders a single musical note on a treble clef staff as an SVG, including ledger lines and stem direction, along with a note name label and a TablatureSymbol fingering diagram below it.
Renders a small SVG fingering diagram for a 4-hole ocarina note, supporting named sizes (sm/md/lg) or numeric pixel widths, custom hole layouts, and an optional note name label.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (authenticated or anonymous) using React Query, and invalidates all dependent queries whenever the actor instance changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider for ICP, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status via a React context backed by the DFINITY AuthClient.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for the backend actor, covering fingering patterns, songs, preset songs, custom ocarina layouts, sound settings, and sound presets with corresponding queries and mutations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that imports Google Fonts, sets up Tailwind directives, defines a parchment-themed OKLCH color palette for light/dark modes, and provides custom component classes for ocarina notation visuals.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the app with QueryClientProvider for React Query and InternetIdentityProvider for ICP authentication.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Landing page component displaying a hero section, a fingering chart preview for demo notes, and feature navigation cards linking to the song editor, design editor, settings, and library.
frontend/src/pages/PresetSongsPage.tsx: Page that fetches and displays preset songs grouped by genre (folk, rock, electronic, reggae, reggaeton) as cards, with a button to load a selected song into the song editor.
frontend/src/utils/audioEngine.ts: Web Audio API utility that synthesizes ocarina and piano note playback using oscillators, filters, envelopes, and optional reverb delay, with frequency calculation supporting octave and pitch offset.
frontend/src/utils/sheetMusicAnalyzer.ts: Browser-side sheet music image analyzer using Canvas API heuristics to detect staff lines and note head blobs, then maps vertical positions to note names and durations.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with parchment/ink OKLCH color palettes, serif/sans font families, custom shadows, border radii, and animation keyframes for the ocarina app UI.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state (version 7) for an ocarina/piano music composition and tablature app, including architectural notes, known issues, and a list of existing implemented features with their requirements.
